51.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I never made up the days I owed from Ramadan during the lifetime of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ except in Sha'ban."
51.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku tidak pernah mengqadha hari-hari Ramadan yang tersisa selama hayat Rasulullah ﷺ kecuali di bulan Sya'ban."

52.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to her: "Were it not that your people have only recently left polytheism, I would demolish the Ka'bah, level it to the ground, give it two doors — one to the east and one to the west — and extend it by six cubits from the Hijr, for the Quraysh had shortened it when they built the Ka'bah."
52.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda kepadanya: "Seandainya bukan karena kaummu baru saja meninggalkan kemusyrikan, aku akan meruntuhkan Ka'bah, meratakannya dengan tanah, memberinya dua pintu — satu ke timur dan satu ke barat — dan memperluasnya enam hasta dari Hijr, karena Quraisy telah mempersempitnya ketika mereka membangun Ka'bah."

53.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "There is no person who has a night prayer but is overcome by sleep, except that his sleep is counted as charity for him and his reward for that prayer is recorded."
53.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Tidak ada seseorang yang memiliki shalat malam tetapi dikalahkan oleh tidur, kecuali tidurnya dihitung sebagai sedekah baginya dan pahalanya untuk shalat itu dicatat."

54.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to her: "Were it not that your people have only recently left polytheism, I would demolish the Ka'bah." He then repeated what was mentioned in the earlier narration.
54.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda kepadanya: "Seandainya bukan karena kaummu baru saja meninggalkan kemusyrikan, aku akan meruntuhkan Ka'bah." Beliau kemudian mengulang apa yang disebutkan dalam riwayat sebelumnya.

55.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not die until women were made lawful for him."
55.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ tidak wafat hingga wanita dihalalkan baginya."

56.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding Barirah: "Buy her, and set her free, for wala belongs to the one who emancipates." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ came to her while the pot was boiling with meat and asked where it came from. When told it was gifted by Barirah as charity given to her, he said: "This is charity for her and a gift for us." She was also given the choice regarding her husband, and the Prophet ﷺ advised her.
56.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai Barirah: "Belilah dia, dan bebaskan dia, karena wala adalah milik orang yang memerdekakan." Rasulullah ﷺ datang kepadanya sementara periuk sedang mendidih berisi daging dan bertanya dari mana asalnya. Ketika diberitahu bahwa itu hadiah dari Barirah sebagai sedekah yang diberikan kepadanya, beliau bersabda: "Ini adalah sedekah baginya dan hadiah bagi kami." Ia juga diberi pilihan mengenai suaminya, dan Nabi ﷺ menasihatinya.

57.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while in her house, wearing a lower garment and cloak, faced the qiblah and stretched out his hands, saying: "O Allah, I am only a human. Whichever of Your servants I have struck or harmed, do not punish me for it."
57.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ sementara berada di rumahnya, mengenakan kain bawah dan selendang, menghadap kiblat dan merentangkan tangannya, berdoa: "Ya Allah, aku hanyalah seorang manusia. Hamba-Mu mana pun yang telah aku pukul atau sakiti, janganlah menghukumku karenanya."

58.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "Do not revile the dead, for they have reached what they have sent forward."
58.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Janganlah mencela orang yang telah meninggal, karena mereka telah sampai kepada apa yang telah mereka kirimkan ke depan."

59.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when two-thirds of the night had passed, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would go to Baqi' and say: "Peace be upon you, O people of the abode of the believers. What you were promised is coming tomorrow at a set time. And we, if Allah wills, will join you."
59.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika dua pertiga malam telah berlalu, Rasulullah ﷺ pergi ke Baqi' dan berkata: "Salam sejahtera atas kalian, wahai penduduk hunian kaum mukminin. Apa yang dijanjikan kepada kalian akan datang esok pada waktu yang ditetapkan. Dan kami, jika Allah menghendaki, akan menyusul kalian."

60.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever performs a deed that is not in accordance with our command, it is rejected.'"
60.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa melakukan suatu amalan yang tidak sesuai dengan perintah kami, maka itu tertolak.'"

61.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "The most beloved deed to Allah is the most consistent one, even if it is little." And: "Take on of deeds only what you are able to sustain."
61.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Amalan yang paling dicintai Allah adalah yang paling konsisten, meskipun sedikit." Dan: "Ambillah dari amalan-amalan hanya yang mampu kalian pertahankan."

62.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Excuse people of standing for their lapses, except for the prescribed punishments."
62.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Maafkanlah orang-orang yang berkedudukan atas kesalahan mereka, kecuali dalam hukuman yang ditetapkan."

63.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "It is not lawful to shed the blood of a Muslim who testifies that there is no god but Allah and that I am the Messenger of Allah, except in three cases: one who abandons Islam, one who leaves the community, the married adulterer, and one who kills a person in retaliation."
63.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Tidak halal darah seorang Muslim yang bersaksi bahwa tidak ada tuhan selain Allah dan bahwa aku adalah Rasulullah, kecuali dalam tiga kasus: orang yang meninggalkan Islam, orang yang meninggalkan jamaah, pezina yang sudah menikah, dan orang yang membunuh jiwa sebagai balasan."

64.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I applied perfume to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ for his ihram when he entered it, and when he exited ihram before performing the tawaf of the House."
64.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku memakaikan wewangian kepada Rasulullah ﷺ untuk ihramnya ketika beliau memasukinya, dan ketika beliau keluar dari ihram sebelum melakukan tawaf Baitullah."

65.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "Did you not know what the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said? 'It is not lawful to shed a man's blood except in the case of one who apostates, or leaves Islam, or commits adultery after being married, or kills a person except in just retaliation.'"
65.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Tidakkah kamu tahu apa yang dikatakan Rasulullah ﷺ? 'Tidak halal menumpahkan darah seorang laki-laki kecuali dalam kasus orang yang murtad, atau meninggalkan Islam, atau berzina setelah menikah, atau membunuh seseorang kecuali sebagai balasan yang adil.'"

66.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when a man fell from a palm tree and died, the Prophet ﷺ was brought his inheritance. He asked: "Does he have any relatives or kin?" They said: "No." He said: "Give his inheritance to some of the people of his village."
66.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika seorang laki-laki jatuh dari pohon kurma dan meninggal, Nabi ﷺ dibawakan warisannya. Beliau bertanya: "Apakah dia memiliki kerabat atau sanak saudara?" Mereka berkata: "Tidak." Beliau bersabda: "Berikan warisannya kepada sebagian penduduk desanya."

67.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said the talbiyah of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was: "Labbayk Allahumma labbayk, labbayk la sharika laka labbayk, innal hamda wan-ni'mata laka wal-mulk (Here I am, O Allah, here I am. Here I am, You have no partner, here I am. Surely all praise, grace and sovereignty belong to You)."
67.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menyebutkan talbiyah Rasulullah ﷺ adalah: "Labbaikallahumma labbaik, labbaika la syarika laka labbaik, innal hamda wan-ni'mata laka wal-mulk (Aku datang memenuhi panggilan-Mu, ya Allah, aku datang. Aku datang, tiada sekutu bagi-Mu, aku datang. Sesungguhnya segala pujian, nikmat dan kekuasaan adalah milik-Mu)."

68.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I never saw anyone suffer more intensely from illness than the Messenger of Allah ﷺ."
68.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku tidak pernah melihat siapa pun menderita lebih intens karena sakit daripada Rasulullah ﷺ."

69.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave an instruction in a certain matter and some men declined it, he said: "What is the matter with men who are given a command but they decline? By Allah, I am the most knowledgeable of them about Allah the Almighty and the most fearful of Him."
69.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Rasulullah ﷺ memberikan instruksi dalam suatu hal dan beberapa laki-laki menolaknya, beliau bersabda: "Ada apa dengan laki-laki yang diberi perintah tetapi mereka menolak? Demi Allah, akulah yang paling berpengetahuan tentang Allah Yang Maha Mulia dan yang paling takut kepada-Nya."

70.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ, when he was ill, would recite the Mu'awwidhat over himself and blow.
70.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ ketika beliau sakit, membaca al-Mu'awwidhat atas dirinya sendiri dan meniupnya.

71.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the Prophet ﷺ was in i'tikaf, he would bring his head close to her for her to comb it. He would not enter the house except for what a person must do.
71.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Nabi ﷺ beri'tikaf, beliau mendekatkan kepalanya kepadanya agar ia bisa menyisirnya. Beliau tidak masuk ke dalam rumah kecuali untuk keperluan yang harus dilakukan seseorang.

72.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "Whenever the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was given a choice between two matters, he chose the easier of the two, as long as it did not involve sin. If it involved sin, he was the furthest of people from it. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ never took revenge for himself for anything done to him, unless the sanctities of Allah were violated, in which case he would take revenge for Allah the Almighty."
72.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Kapanpun Rasulullah ﷺ diberikan pilihan antara dua hal, beliau memilih yang lebih mudah dari keduanya, selama itu tidak melibatkan dosa. Jika melibatkan dosa, beliau adalah yang paling jauh dari orang-orang dari itu. Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah membalas dendam untuk dirinya sendiri atas apapun yang dilakukan kepadanya, kecuali jika kehormatan Allah dilanggar, dalam hal itu beliau mengambil pembalasan untuk Allah Yang Maha Mulia."

73.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to pray eleven rak'ahs at night, praying Witr with one of them. When he finished his prayer, he would lie on his right side.
73.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa shalat sebelas rakaat di malam hari, melaksanakan Witir dengan satu di antaranya. Ketika selesai shalatnya, beliau berbaring di sisi kanannya.

74.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked with what the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would begin when he entered the house, and with what he would conclude. She said: "He would begin with using the miswak and conclude with the two rak'ahs before Fajr."
74.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya dengan apa Rasulullah ﷺ memulai ketika memasuki rumah, dan dengan apa beliau mengakhiri. Ia berkata: "Beliau memulai dengan menggunakan siwak dan mengakhiri dengan dua rakaat sebelum Subuh."

75.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I raced the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and I outran him."
75.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku berlomba dengan Rasulullah ﷺ dan aku mengalahkannya."

76.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would pray while I was lying in front of him. When he wanted to pray Witr, he would nudge me with his foot and say: 'Move aside.'"
76.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ shalat sementara aku berbaring di depannya. Ketika beliau ingin shalat Witir, beliau mendorong aku dengan kakinya dan berkata: 'Minggirlah.'"

77.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked about the prayer of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ after the night prayer. She said: "He would pray thirteen rak'ahs — nine of them standing, two of them sitting, and two after the two adhans, meaning between the adhan of Fajr and the iqamah."
77.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya tentang shalat Rasulullah ﷺ setelah shalat Isya. Ia berkata: "Beliau shalat tiga belas rakaat — sembilan di antaranya berdiri, dua duduk, dan dua setelah dua adzan, yaitu antara adzan Subuh dan iqamat."

78.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "A month would pass during which not a single fire was seen in any of the houses of the Prophet ﷺ." When asked what they ate, she said: "The two black ones — dates and water. But the Prophet ﷺ had sincere neighbors from the Ansar who had milk animals and would send him milk from them."
78.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Sebulan berlalu tanpa satu pun api yang terlihat di rumah-rumah Nabi ﷺ." Ketika ditanya apa yang mereka makan, ia berkata: "Dua hal yang hitam — kurma dan air. Tetapi Nabi ﷺ memiliki tetangga yang tulus dari kaum Anshar yang memiliki hewan perah dan mereka mengirimkan susunya kepada beliau."

79.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ placed some coins in her hand and said: "What would Muhammad think if he met Allah the Almighty while these were still with him? Spend them."
79.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ meletakkan beberapa koin di tangannya dan bersabda: "Apa yang akan Muhammad pikirkan jika ia bertemu Allah Yang Maha Mulia sementara benda-benda ini masih bersamanya? Belanjakanlah."

80.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), the Mother of the Believers, that she said: "I used to tie on my lower garment then enter the blanket with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while I was menstruating."
80.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), Ummul Mukminin, bahwa ia berkata: "Aku biasa mengikat kain bawahku kemudian masuk ke dalam selimut bersama Rasulullah ﷺ sementara aku sedang haid."

81.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would become sexually impure then sleep. When he rose, he would bathe and emerge with water dripping from his head, then fast the remainder of that day."
81.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ mengalami junub kemudian tidur. Ketika beliau bangun, beliau mandi dan keluar dengan air menetes dari kepalanya, kemudian berpuasa selama sisa hari itu."

82.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "O Messenger of Allah, if I encounter Laylat al-Qadr, what should I supplicate?" He said: "Say: 'O Allah, You are All-Pardoning, You love to pardon, so pardon me.'"
82.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Wahai Rasulullah, jika aku bertemu Lailatul Qadar, dengan apa aku berdoa?" Beliau bersabda: "Ucapkanlah: 'Ya Allah, Engkau Maha Pemaaf, Engkau mencintai pemaafan, maka maafkanlah aku.'"

83.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that on the fourth night the mosque was packed with worshippers and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not come out. The next morning he said: "O people, I heard what you said. Nothing prevented me from coming out to you except my fear that it would be made obligatory for you — to maintain this month's night prayer."
83.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa pada malam keempat masjid penuh dengan jamaah dan Rasulullah ﷺ tidak keluar. Keesokan paginya beliau bersabda: "Wahai manusia, aku mendengar apa yang kalian katakan. Tidak ada yang menghalangiku untuk keluar kepada kalian kecuali rasa takutku bahwa itu akan diwajibkan atas kalian — untuk menjaga shalat malam bulan ini."

84.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she asked: "O Messenger of Allah, if I encounter Laylat al-Qadr, what should I supplicate?" He said: "Say: 'O Allah, You are All-Pardoning, You love to pardon, so pardon me.'"
84.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia bertanya: "Wahai Rasulullah, jika aku bertemu Lailatul Qadar, dengan apa aku berdoa?" Beliau bersabda: "Ucapkanlah: 'Ya Allah, Engkau Maha Pemaaf, Engkau mencintai pemaafan, maka maafkanlah aku.'"

85.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I used to twist the garlands for the sacrificial animals of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, and he would send them while refraining from nothing that he used to do before."
85.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku biasa menganyam kalung-kalung hewan kurban Rasulullah ﷺ, dan beliau mengirimkannya sementara tidak menahan diri dari apapun yang biasa beliau lakukan sebelumnya."

86.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to keep the two rak'ahs before Fajr brief. I think he would recite in them something like 'Say: O you disbelievers' and 'Say: He is Allah, the One.'"
86.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ biasa meringkas dua rakaat sebelum Subuh. Aku pikir beliau membaca di dalamnya sesuatu seperti 'Qul ya ayyuhal kafirun' dan 'Qul huwallahu ahad.'"

87.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ, when it reached him that people disliked facing the qiblah with one's private parts, commanded that his toilet be turned to face the qiblah.
87.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ ketika sampai kepadanya bahwa orang-orang tidak suka menghadap kiblat dengan aurat mereka, memerintahkan agar toilet pribadinya diputar untuk menghadap kiblat.

88.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to wake up in the morning in a state of ritual impurity from other than a wet dream, then he would fast.
88.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa bangun di pagi hari dalam keadaan junub bukan karena mimpi basah, kemudian beliau berpuasa.

89.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray sitting. When he wanted to bow, he would stand up, recite around ten verses or as much as Allah willed, then bow.
89.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat dalam keadaan duduk. Ketika beliau ingin ruku, beliau berdiri, membaca sekitar sepuluh ayat atau sebanyak yang Allah kehendaki, kemudian ruku.

90.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "Our door was facing the qiblah of the mosque. I knocked and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was praying, so he walked over and opened it for me, then returned to his place."
90.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Pintu kami menghadap ke arah kiblat masjid. Aku mengetuk dan Rasulullah ﷺ sedang shalat, maka beliau berjalan dan membukakan pintu untukku, kemudian kembali ke tempatnya."

91.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Every condition that is not in the Book of Allah the Almighty is rejected, even if they stipulate it a hundred times.'"
91.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Setiap syarat yang tidak ada dalam Kitab Allah Yang Maha Mulia adalah tertolak, meskipun mereka mensyaratkannya seratus kali.'"

92.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she asked: "If I encounter Laylat al-Qadr, what should I ask of my Lord the Almighty?" He said: "Say: 'O Allah, You are All-Pardoning, You love to pardon, so pardon me.'"
92.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia bertanya: "Jika aku bertemu Lailatul Qadar, apa yang harus aku minta kepada Rabbku Yang Maha Mulia?" Beliau bersabda: "Ucapkanlah: 'Ya Allah, Engkau Maha Pemaaf, Engkau mencintai pemaafan, maka maafkanlah aku.'"

93.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when asked about the two rak'ahs after 'Asr, she corrected what had been attributed to her: "Ibn al-Zubayr did not preserve it accurately. I only told him that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prayed those two rak'ahs after 'Asr in my home. When I asked him about it, he said: 'Something came to me and it occupied me from the two rak'ahs after Dhuhr.'"
93.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ditanya tentang dua rakaat setelah Ashar, ia mengoreksi apa yang telah dinisbatkan kepadanya: "Ibnu al-Zubayr tidak menyimpannya dengan akurat. Aku hanya memberitahunya bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ shalat dua rakaat itu setelah Ashar di rumahku. Ketika aku bertanya kepadanya tentang hal itu, beliau berkata: 'Sesuatu datang kepadaku dan menyibukkanku dari dua rakaat setelah Dzuhur.'"

94.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, when he finished the prayer, would say: "O Allah, You are Peace and from You is peace. Blessed are You, O Possessor of Majesty and Honor."
94.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ketika selesai shalat, berucap: "Allahumma antas-salam wa minkas-salam, tabarakta ya dzal-jalali wal-ikram (Ya Allah, Engkau adalah Salam dan dari-Mu keselamatan. Maha Berkah Engkau, wahai Pemilik Keagungan dan Kemuliaan)."

95.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "He frequently said: 'Glory be to Allah and I praise Him, and I seek His forgiveness and repent to Him.' I asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, you are making a supplication you never made before.' He said: 'My Lord the Almighty informed me that I would see a sign among my ummah, and when I see that sign I should glorify Him with praise and seek His forgiveness. I have seen it: when comes the victory of Allah and the conquest, and you see people entering the religion of Allah in multitudes.'"
95.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Beliau sering mengucapkan: 'Subhanallahi wa bihamdih, wa astaghfirullaha wa atubu ilaih.' Aku bertanya: 'Wahai Rasulullah, engkau membaca doa yang belum pernah engkau baca sebelumnya.' Beliau bersabda: 'Rabbku Yang Maha Mulia memberitahuku bahwa aku akan melihat suatu tanda di antara umatku, dan ketika aku melihat tanda itu aku harus bertasbih dengan memuji-Nya dan memohon ampunan-Nya. Aku telah melihatnya: ketika datang pertolongan Allah dan kemenangan, dan engkau melihat orang-orang memasuki agama Allah berbondong-bondong.'"

96.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she confirmed: "A man may wake up in the morning in a state of ritual impurity and bathe, and complete his fast of that day." She also confirmed: "He may wake up in the morning in a state of impurity from other than a wet dream and complete his fast."
96.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia mengkonfirmasi: "Seorang laki-laki dapat bangun di pagi hari dalam keadaan junub lalu mandi, dan menyelesaikan puasanya hari itu." Ia juga mengkonfirmasi: "Ia dapat bangun di pagi hari dalam keadaan junub bukan karena mimpi basah dan menyelesaikan puasanya."

97.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to recite quietly in the two rak'ahs before Fajr, reciting in them 'Say: O you disbelievers' and 'Say: He is Allah, the One.'
97.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa membaca pelan-pelan pada dua rakaat sebelum Subuh, membaca di dalamnya 'Qul ya ayyuhal kafirun' dan 'Qul huwallahu ahad.'

98.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ, when it reached him that people disliked facing the qiblah with their private parts while relieving themselves, commanded that his toilet seat face the qiblah."
98.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ ketika sampai kepadanya bahwa orang-orang tidak suka menghadap kiblat dengan aurat mereka saat buang hajat, memerintahkan agar tempat duduk toiletnya menghadap kiblat."

99.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that young girls used to come out from their curtained areas to join the Messenger of Allah ﷺ during the two Eids.
99.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa gadis-gadis kecil biasa keluar dari bilik mereka untuk bergabung dengan Rasulullah ﷺ selama dua Ied.

100.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), the wife of the Prophet ﷺ, or Hafsa — or both of them — that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "It is not lawful for a woman who believes in Allah to mourn for more than three days except for her husband."
100.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), istri Nabi ﷺ, atau Hafshah — atau keduanya — bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Tidak halal bagi seorang wanita yang beriman kepada Allah untuk berkabung lebih dari tiga hari kecuali untuk suaminya."
